methodology: Only counted NEW findings added by the validator (Kokina) that were completely absent from the doctor's report. Excluded: wording/severity changes, reformulations, template language (Fleischner, ACR recommendations), measurement precision differences, stylistic differences.

misses.missed_finding: Bilateral micronodules up to 2 mm
misses.validator_text: Few micronodules on the both sides (up to 2 mm).

misses.missed_finding: Subpleural reticulation and ground glass in right lower lobe (interstitial changes)
misses.validator_text: Small subpleural areas of reticulation and ground glass in the right lower lobe may correspond to clinically insignificant interstitial changes.

misses.missed_finding: Micronodules in lower lobes of both lungs
misses.validator_text: A few micronodules in the lower lobes of both lungs.

misses.missed_finding: Pulmonary artery dilation (3.1 cm) suggesting pulmonary hypertension
misses.validator_text: The main pulmonary artery is dilated (3.1 cm). Dilation of the pulmonary artery, which may indicate pulmonary hypertension.

misses.missed_finding: Osteosclerotic lesion in T11 vertebral body
misses.validator_text: Osteosclerotic lesion of the vertebral body T11 up to 5 mm.

misses.missed_finding: Small hiatal hernia
misses.validator_text: Small hiatal hernia.

misses.missed_finding: Osteoblastic lesions in T5 and T9 vertebral bodies (1.1 cm and 1.0 cm)
misses.validator_text: Osteoblastic lesions in the bodies of the T5 and T9 vertebrae 1.1 cm and 1.0 cm respectively.

misses.missed_finding: Ovoid lesion in the left breast (1.1 x 1.0 cm)
misses.validator_text: An ovoid lesion in the left breast 1.1 × 1.0 cm. Given the breast density, ultrasound is recommended.

misses.missed_finding: Mild pericardial effusion
misses.validator_text: Mild pericardial effusion is probably due to an inflammatory process.

misses.missed_finding: Left ventricular hypertrophy
misses.validator_text: No cardiomegaly, left ventricular hypertrophy.

misses.missed_finding: Osteosclerotic lesions in right humeral head and 3rd/8th ribs on the right (bone islands)
misses.anatomical_location: Right humeral head, right 3rd and 8th ribs
misses.validator_text: Osteosclerotic lesions of the right humeral head and the third and eighth ribs on the right (bone islands).

misses.missed_finding: Left adrenal lesion (1.2 cm, 16 HU), increased in size
misses.validator_text: Left adrenal lesion, 1.2 cm, 16 HU, increased in size along the short axis by 0.3 cm. Further evaluation with adrenal protocol CT is recommended.

misses.missed_finding: Paraseptal emphysema (in addition to centrilobular)
misses.validator_text: Moderate centrilobular emphysema, mild paraseptal emphysema.

misses.missed_finding: Bronchial wall thickening of segmental and subsegmental bronchi
misses.validator_text: Thickening of the walls of segmental and subsegmental bronchi.

misses.missed_finding: Small hiatal hernia
misses.validator_text: Small hiatal hernia.

misses.missed_finding: Single cyst in the left upper lobe
misses.validator_text: single cyst in the left upper lobe.

misses.missed_finding: Lipomatous hypertrophy of the interatrial septum
misses.validator_text: Lipomatous hypertrophy of the interatrial septum.

misses.missed_finding: Small hiatal hernia
misses.validator_text: Small hiatal hernia.

misses.missed_finding: Additional pulmonary nodules identified in multiple lobes requiring follow-up (up to 7 mm, multiple locations with image references)
misses.validator_text: Multiple round and triangular solid nodules in both lungs: upper lobe on the right single nodule 5 mm; middle lobe on the right a few nodules up to 6 mm; lower lobe on the right a few nodules up to 7 mm; upper lobe on the left a few nodules up to 4 mm; lower lobe on the left several nodules up to 7 mm. Some solid nodules may require CT at 3–6 months.

misses.missed_finding: Interstitial lung abnormality (fibrosis) in right lower lobe with negative interval change, including group of cysts, traction bronchiectasis, ground glass opacities
misses.validator_text: Group of cysts, traction bronchiectasis, reticulations and ground glass opacities in the lower lobe of the right lung, negative progression due to an increase in ground-glass opacities.

misses.missed_finding: Gastric dilatation
misses.validator_text: Gastric dilatation.
